archetypeDefinitions.LEAD_GUARD: Expected 24+ minutes, not a center, guard position or assist-heavy profile.
archetypeDefinitions.TABLE_SETTING_LEAD_GUARD: High-minute lead guard driven more by assist orchestration than pure scoring volume, below heliocentric thresholds.
archetypeDefinitions.SCORE_FIRST_LEAD_GUARD: High-minute lead guard with stronger points and 3PM scoring pressure than table-setting creation volume.
archetypeDefinitions.HELIOCENTRIC_GUARD: Expected 32+ minutes, star-level scoring and assists, primary ball-dominant guard creator.
archetypeDefinitions.JUMBO_CREATOR_GUARD: Big guard with strong rebounds and assists, lead creation role, and stable 30+ minute workload.
archetypeDefinitions.WING: Expected 24+ minutes, not a center, not classified as lead guard.
archetypeDefinitions.CONNECTOR_WING: High-minute wing with balanced rebound and assist support, lower pure scoring pressure than scoring wings.
archetypeDefinitions.SPOTUP_WING: High-minute wing leaning toward points and 3PM production without the broader creator profile of advanced wing archetypes.
archetypeDefinitions.BENCH_GUARD: Low-minute or low-start-rate reserve guard with assist-driven secondary creation.
archetypeDefinitions.BENCH_WING: Low-minute or low-start-rate reserve wing with balanced non-primary scoring profile.
archetypeDefinitions.BENCH_SCORING_WING: Low-minute or low-start-rate scoring reserve wing driven by points and 3PM volume.
archetypeDefinitions.BENCH_CREATOR_SCORER: Reserve scorer with secondary creation juice, stronger assist pressure than pure shooting specialists.
archetypeDefinitions.BENCH_REBOUNDING_SCORER: Reserve scorer with stronger rebounding involvement and forward-style combo-market shape.
archetypeDefinitions.BENCH_SPACER_SCORER: Reserve scorer leaning toward spacing, catch-and-shoot threes, and points-driven line shape.
archetypeDefinitions.BENCH_BIG: Low-minute or low-start-rate reserve big with rebound-centric frontcourt profile.
archetypeDefinitions.TWO_WAY_MARKET_WING: High-minute balanced wing with two-way box score output and market-shaped prop behavior across assists, threes, and combos.
archetypeDefinitions.SCORER_CREATOR_WING: High-minute scoring wing with stable secondary creation, strong line-shape sensitivity, and combo markets driven by gap and minutes.
archetypeDefinitions.SHOT_CREATING_WING: Expected 32+ minutes, non-center high-volume scorer with strong 3PM volume and secondary creation, but below heliocentric guard assist levels.
archetypeDefinitions.MARKET_SHAPED_SCORING_WING: High-minute wing scorer whose prop behavior is strongly driven by market pricing and line shape.
archetypeDefinitions.STRETCH_RIM_PROTECTOR_CENTER: Expected 26+ minutes, center position, strong rebound profile, and either stretch 3PM volume or star-level scoring.
archetypeDefinitions.POINT_FORWARD: Expected 24+ minutes, forward-sized creator with star-level points/rebounds/assists and low 3PM volume.
archetypeDefinitions.LOW_MINUTE_BENCH: Expected under 24 minutes or low starter rate.
